purpose: Defines the `!start` command for starting the Synapse dashboard. Two modes: Option A Electron app (recommended — embeds the SSE server, started via `cd {tracker_root} && npm start`) and Option B standalone server (browser-only, started via `node {tracker_root}/src/server/index.js &` if Electron is unavailable). Includes port-conflict detection on port 3456.
gotchas: Do NOT start the standalone server when using Electron mode — Electron embeds the server internally; running both causes a port conflict on 3456
Default port is 3456 (hardcoded in both modes)
Option B verification uses curl against /api/dashboards — the standalone server must be running this endpoint
lsof check: if PID returned for port 3456, server is already running
patterns: Option A 3-step: locate tracker → npm start → report
Option B 3-step: lsof check → start with & + 1s wait + curl verify → report
Port-availability gate via lsof before starting
conventions: Two parallel options labeled A and B with recommendation prefix
Bash code blocks with explicit lsof/curl commands
